title: ONYX PvP Essentials
body:
Enhances Pvp Visuals While Keeping Block/Item Textures Vanilla
Built For Domination.
 



**About:**

Onyx PvP Essentials is designed for players who want a cleaner, more focused combat experience. It removes visual clutter and tones down distracting effects so you can track opponents and react faster in fights.

With a darker UI, refined particles, and optimized visuals, everything feels smoother and easier to read. Every change is subtle but meaningful.

**Features:**

Lower Fire
Lower Shield
Dark Mode Custom UI
White Enchantment Glint
Smaller Tools For Better Visibility
Retextured Effect/Crit/Hit Particles
Removed Unwanted Particles (ex. explosions, food etc.)
 

NOT ENOUGH? - check out [ONYX ULTRA](https://ascentmc.gumroad.com/l/onyxultra)! *50% OFF*
